title: ursinia macropoda
intro: Ursinia macropoda, also known as the 'Bokbaaibos' or 'Yellow Daisy', is a small, yellow-flowering shrub native to South Africa. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Ursinia macropoda include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially exhibiting anticancer properties. Ursinia macropoda can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is traditionally used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
